pageContext.name: Spartan Army Commander (Black)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and TBLeague are proud to present the iconic Spartan Army Commander (Black) Sixth Scale Figure!  The Spartan Army Commander (Black) comes equipped with a stunning set of black armor along with her bow and shield. With a seamless and posable body in highly detailed 1:6 scale form, she is ready to lead her troops into battle!  Add the Spartan Army Commander (Black) Sixth Scale Figure to your collection today!
